roa.docketEntryComment: DEFT'S PETITION FOR PRIMARY CAREGIVER DIVERSION FILED

/CAL: REQUEST BY COUNSEL TO RECALL BENCH WARRANT/DAWT/X:ATTORNEY'S REQUESTTO RECALL OUTSTANDING BENCH WARRANT - GRANTED/X:NO OUTSTANDING BENCH WARRANTS ARE SHOWING/VD:02-25-21/X:CASE WAS DISMISSED ON 02-22-21 IN DEPT, 9/
/CAL:BENCH WARRANT RETURN/INTC/X:SHERIFF'S AFFIDAVIT WARRANT DISCHARGED//X:DA'S ORAL MOTION TO DISMISS IN LIGHT OF FEDERAL INDICTMENT PUR  1387PC IS GRANTED/VD:HEARING OF 02-25-21/

/CAL:CUSTODY STATUS/INTC/EMMOD:DEFENDANT WILL HAVE A CURFEW AND MUST REMAIN IN THE PREMISES LOCATEDAT 10862 PEARLS ST, OAKLAND, CA FROM 6PM - 8AM/SAORD/SA4:THE TENDERLOIN BORDERED BY O'FARRELL ST, POLK ST, MARKET ST, POWELL ST SF CA/WS/X:THE COURT CONFIRMS THE FUTURE DATE OF 01-28-21 IN M09 FORPCD MOTION/

/CAL: ARRIAGNMENT/CON: DAVID HARRISON/INTC/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DENOF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/STWPX/987,2/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON HOME DETENTION MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SETFORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAKGROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/SA2: GOLDEN GATE & LARKIN IN SF CA/SAORD/CONTD: PRIMARY CARE DIVERSION /DOP
/CAL:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DAWT/X:DEFENDANT IS IN FEDERAL CUSTODY AT THISTIME/CONT/DOP/
